module.name: Intelligence
module.description: Training on intelligence analysis, prediction models, and global strategy.

intelligence_behavioral_profiling.name: Behavioral Profiling
intelligence_behavioral_profiling.description: Training on analyzing psychological patterns and predicting human behavior in intelligence operations.

intelligence_cyber_intelligence.name: Cyber Intelligence
intelligence_cyber_intelligence.description: Training on tracking digital threats, cybercriminal networks, and state-sponsored hacking groups.

intelligence_intelligence_analysis.name: Intelligence Analysis
intelligence_intelligence_analysis.description: Training on processing and analyzing raw intelligence data to extract actionable insights.

intelligence_linguistic_analysis.name: Linguistic Analysis
intelligence_linguistic_analysis.description: Training in language processing, sentiment analysis, and detecting deception in communication.

intelligence_open_source_intelligence.name: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT)
intelligence_open_source_intelligence.description: Techniques for gathering intelligence from publicly available sources, including social media, databases, and news.

intelligence_strategic_forecasting.name: Strategic Forecasting
intelligence_strategic_forecasting.description: Training in predictive intelligence, scenario planning, and long-term geopolitical forecasting.

intelligence_behavioral_profiling_crimin.name: Criminal Behavior Analysis
intelligence_behavioral_profiling_crimin.description: Techniques for analyzing criminal behavior and psychological motivations.

cards.title: Deception Patterns in Criminal Behavior
cards.description: Identifying lies, inconsistencies, and deceptive behaviors in suspects. This card covers key aspects including Analyze microexpressions (involuntary facial movements) to detect deception, Use Statement Analysis to identify linguistic inconsistencies in suspect testimonies, Apply cognitive load techniques (e.g., unexpected questions) to expose lies, providing practical knowledge applicable to intelligence analysis, HUMINT/SIGINT/OSINT, and threat assessment.
bulletpoints: Analyze microexpressions (involuntary facial movements) to detect deception — this concept is critical for effective deception patterns in criminal behavior because practitioners must understand how it integrates with related operational procedures and real-world application contexts

Use Statement Analysis to identify linguistic inconsistencies in suspect testimonies — this concept is critical for effective deception patterns in criminal behavior because practitioners must understand how it integrates with related operational procedures and real-world application contexts

Apply cognitive load techniques (e.g., unexpected questions) to expose lies — this concept is critical for effective deception patterns in criminal behavior because practitioners must understand how it integrates with related operational procedures and real-world application contexts

Advanced practitioners demonstrate competency through counterintelligence, applying theoretical knowledge to novel situations and adapting standard procedures to meet the specific demands of each unique operational context encountered

cards.title: Automated Web Scraping for OSINT
